name: Lentilla Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Toss well to mix.
Makes 1 serving. Each serving provides 1 protein, 4 vegetables, 2 breads, and optional calories.
Per serving: 287 calories, 16 gm protein, 10 gm fat, 36 gm carbohydrates, 312 mg calcium, 412 mg sodium, 22 mg cholesterol, 5 gm fiber.
